item.title: TV host Savannah Guthrie shares guilt over mother Nancy’s suspected kidnapping
item.description: The presenter revealed a devastating conversation she had with her siblings, eight weeks after the disappearance.

item.title: Footy legend Wendell Sailor gets court reprieve over drunken incidents
item.description: Wendell Sailor has faced the music over criminal charges, but isn’t happy about some ‘fake news’.

item.title: Iran bans national teams from playing in ‘hostile’ countries until further notice
item.description: The country’s football federation has been ordered to take action.

item.title: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle Australian tour: Petition sparks funding debate as taxpayers question tour bill
item.description: A petition against their upcoming visit has since gathered thousands of signatures.

item.title: British comedian Jimmy Carr’s comments on the ‘manosphere’ and men’s mental health go viral
item.description: The British star was put on the spot by an audience member who questioned him about toxic masculinity.

item.title: Major Centrelink boost coming to parental leave entitlements
item.description: The change will be in effect from July.

item.title: Nelly Furtado attends women’s event five months after retirement announcement amid body-shaming controversy
item.description: The Canadian musician made the decision to step away from the stage in October last year.

item.title: Electric vehicle loans double as pressured drivers dodge petrol pump as Middle East war causes price pressures
item.description: Unleaded petrol prices have jumped between 61 and 92 per cent in Australian capital cities.

item.title: Brisbane's Bluey leaps from screen to console in new video game Happy Snaps launching in spring
item.description: ‘We hope this game to be really as big as the TV show.’

item.title: US-Iran war live updates: The sneaky way oil tankers are making it through the ‘Tehran toll booth’ in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Sleep divorce: How staying in separate beds can save your marriage
item.description: ‘My husband came home to a big surprise.’

item.title: Golf legend Tiger Woods involved in another serious car crash
item.description: Police have have confirmed the 50-year-old showed ‘signs of impairment’ at the time of the accident.

item.title: ‘It destroys you watching them suffer’: Parents make superhero move for Sydney sisters born with ‘ultra rare’ genetic disease PGAP1-CDG
item.description: ‘It just destroys you watching them suffer.’

item.title: Building expert Kurt Hegetschweiler reveals the key questions to ask tradies as costs rise due to fuel crisis
item.description: The war in the Middle East has triggered a costs crisis in the construction industry — but there’s a way to stay safe.

item.title: Three dead in tourist chopper crash off Kauai, Hawaii
item.description: The area’s geography of tall seaside cliffs and sharp mountain ridges can contribute to turbulent air and quick weather changes that pose hazards for aviation.

item.title: Kyle Sandilands begins $85 million legal battle with ARN over radio sacking
item.description: Things took a strange turn as the radio veteran walked outside into the media scrum.

item.title: ‘I just sobbed’: The long road to an endometriosis diagnosis — and the gap leaving women waiting for years
item.description: It usually takes a visit to six different doctors to figure out what's going on.

item.title: 7NEWS The Issue Podcast: Angus Taylor opens up on family tragedy, the fuel crisis and Pauline Hanson
item.description: ‘I could not have done what I’ve done through my life without that.’

item.title: Twenty-two migrants die, 26 rescued off island of Crete on Greek coast
item.description: A boat reportedly drifted for days off Greece.

item.title: US-Iran war live updates: Victoria announces free public transport throughout April amid ongoing fuel crisis
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Scott McLaughlin breaks through fence in violent high-speed IndyCar crash at Barber
item.description: The helpless champion ‘knew he was done’ as his car hurtled towards the barrier at more than 200km/h.

item.title: What estranged siblings can learn from Hilary and Haylie Duff’s fractured relationship
item.description: ‘Some families have a system of repair and others do not.’

item.title: Ciaron Maher masterstroke in Australian Cup as Light Infantry Man edges out Pride Of Jenni for back-to-back wins
item.description: A thrilling race went down to the wire as a crowd favourite went toe-to-toe with a stablemate.

item.title: UFC fighter Joe Pyfer’s chilling suicide revelation after beating Israel Adesanya
item.description: The bout almost never happened after the 29-year-old found himself ‘in a very dark place’ just a couple of weeks ago.

item.title: War in the Middle East reaches one-month milestone - here’s what you need to know
item.description: Donald Trump signalled a swift victory over Iran. This is what has happened in the weeks since.

item.title: Borce Ristevski could be out next year for killing his wife Karen as family fight to keep him locked up | Kiss and Kill
item.description: The high-profile killer could be out as early as next year for taking the life of his wife Karen in 2016.

item.title: Unlucky Oscar Piastri robbed of victory as Kimi Antonelli benefits from safety car to win Japanese GP
item.description: The Aussie looked on track for a stunning win before an unrelated crash ruined his chances.

item.title: US-Iran war live updates: Victoria announces free public transport throughout April amid ongoing fuel crisis
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Max Verstappen already considering retiring as hated Formula 1 rules exposed
item.description: The four-time world champion is sick of it after just three races and knows ‘it’s a bit sad’ to be talking about quitting.

item.title: Adelaide 36ers coach Mike Wells blows up at referees’ treatment of Bryce Cotton in NBL title series
item.description: ‘I know it’s footy season, but that’s a different game right now. We’ve got to play basketball.’

item.title: Cricket Australia draws ire of India as Cam Green managing workloads in IPL start
item.description: There are calls for the Aussie allrounder to be stripped of millions because of an unexpected directive.

item.title: Top baby names in Queensland reveal ‘floral’ trend in newborns
item.description: Parents were inspired by one sporting team for naming baby girls.

item.title: Dire reason NSW won’t follow Victoria’s free public transport lead amid fuel crisis prompted by US-Iran war
item.description: Victorians and Tasmanians will get free public transport to help with the ongoing fuel crisis.

item.title: South Australia win back to back Sheffield Shield titles as Victoria capitulate on final morning
item.description: South Australia have claimed ‘one of the most remarkable Shield wins in years’ on a dramatic final morning.

item.title: Oscar Piastri sends statement with ‘one of my best weekends in F1’ despite missing out on Japanese Grand Prix win
item.description: The Aussie showed everyone just what they’d been missing when he rocketed to the lead on his first official lap of the season.

item.title: US President Donald Trump allows Russian oil tanker to reach Cuba for first time in three months
item.description: A Russian oil tanker has been spotted just off the coast of the island.

item.title: Magda Szubanski’s new memoir Can’t Tell You But I Will set for release following battle with rare cancer
item.description: The comedian announced she was in remission in February.

item.title: Adelaide 36ers lodge formal complaint with NBL against Andrew Bogut after bitter title fight turns ‘personal’
item.description: The fiery NBL grand final series has taken another twist with officials lodging a formal complaint over the rival coach’s behaviour.

item.title: Morning Show host Larry Emdur sends strong warning after falling victim to AI-powered scam
item.description: ‘They’re liars and thieves.’

item.title: Man, seven-year-old child die after ATV rolls into dam in Wyuna, west of Rockhampton
item.description: The pair were in an ATV on the remote Queensland property when they fell down an embankment.

item.title: Landlord left with horrific mess after tenants trash $2m home in Baulkham Hills, NSW
item.description: ‘It was like a horror. It was like I’ve never seen before.’

item.title: New PNG coach Willie Peters reveals focus on homegrown players amid links to superstar Nathan Cleary
item.description: The incoming coach has declared his early plans on the club’s inaugural roster.

item.title: Melbourne ‘disappointed’ by Clayton Oliver not showing up for Max Gawn’s milestone game
item.description: The club great was invited and expected to be there for the superstar’s milestone.

item.title: Kane Cornes accuses Zach Merrett of ‘giving up’ against North Melbourne
item.description: ‘I never thought I would see the day where that proud player would do this.’

item.title: Australia’s overseas fuel dependence sparks debate about making our petrol at home
item.description: The global oil crisis has kicked off calls for Australia to make our own, homegrown fuel. Experts say it’s not that simple.

item.title: Russell Brand's trial on rape, sex assault charges delayed
item.description: The 50-year-old was due to stand trial in June on five counts before being charged with two additional offences.

item.title: eSafety Commissioner Julie Inman-Grant releases report accusing social media giants of dodging under-16s ban
item.description: Facebook, Instagram and TikTok are among the platforms facing fines of almost $50 million.

item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Teenage prodigy Vaibhav Sooryavanshi smashes 15-ball fifty in IPL
item.description: The 15-year-old is in the history books again, a year after he became the competition’s youngest debutant.

item.title: Pictures reveal how fugitive Dezi Freeman was living on rural property in Thologolong, Victoria
item.description: Two deck chairs, a makeshift kitchen, solar panels and beer packaging were all set up on the property.

item.title: Geoff Burrow, father of British rugby league champion Rob Burrow, passes away after short illness
item.description: Less than 24 months after MND tore them apart, the family is in mourning again.

item.title: Three charged with stealing thousands of dollars from elderly victims in Queensland shopping centres
item.description: Shoppers aged between 70 and 94 were allegedly targeted.

item.title: ‘Rock bottom’ Port Adelaide urged to defy David Koch and fully embrace a rebuild
item.description: ‘Of all the 18 clubs, I think they are in the worst position.’

item.title: Arnold Schwarzenegger’s son Joseph Baena wins first bodybuilding competition
item.description: The former Mr Universe had the now 28-year-old child with his housekeeper.

item.title: Daylight savings: here’s what you need to know
item.description: It’s that time of the year again, here’s your quick guide explaining exactly when to turn the clocks back.

item.title: Credit and debit card EFTPOS surcharges banned for EFTPOS machines from October to ease cost-of-living pressures in Australia, Reserve Bank announces
item.description: Aussies are expected to pocket up to $1.6b a year in the latest cost-of-living measure to help struggling households.

item.title: Renault commits to EVs in Australia, promises further lineup expansion
item.description: Renault executives say they're planning to bring plenty of EVs to Australia, but it isn't clear which models or when.

item.title: Jackie ‘O’ Henderson sues Australian Radio Network alleging wrongful termination following Kyle Sandilands saga
item.description: Kyle Sandilands’ co-host has followed her former on-air partner into the courts.

item.title: Aston Martin DBX recalled
item.description: A mechanical defect in Aston Martin's only SUV could lead to a loss of steering control and reduced braking performance.

item.title: CCTV captures woman’s harrowing screams amid Brisbane home invasion
item.description: ‘I just felt that I was going to lose my life this morning.’

item.title: AFL great Garry Lyon takes aim at ‘macho’ Crow Jordon Butts for staying on field after head knock
item.description: ‘Who do you think you’re impressing?’

item.title: Mercedes-Benz A-Class recalled
item.description: Just three A-Class vehicles are affected by a potential fault that could prevent occupants from exiting the vehicle.

item.title: Carlton vice-captain Sam Walsh says players right behind Michael Voss amid fierce spotlight
item.description: Sam Walsh has pointed the finger elsewhere as Voss fights to keep his job at the Blues.

item.title: Middle East war: Brisbane dubbed ‘too hard’ to get around without a car as fuel prices skyrocket amid Iran conflict
item.description: Driving has become the default, not the exception, due to gaps in public transport.

item.title: Toyota HiLux recalled
item.description: New-generation Toyota HiLux utes with bull or nudge bars fitted may have an incorrectly installed wiring harness that prevents the electric power steering from working.

item.title: Dragons recruit Keaon Koloamatangi ‘couldn’t care less’ about form of his future club
item.description: The big-money signing isn’t fazed by the club’s current plight ahead of his arrival at the end of the season.

item.title: Angelina Jolie sparks concern during Tom Ford event at Shanghai Fashion Week
item.description: While many praised her simple yet stylish look, some expressed concern about her health.

item.title: Young workers between 18 and 20 to be paid full wages as Fair Work Commission scraps junior rates
item.description: The workplace watchdog has deemed it unfair for young adults to be paid less for doing the same job.

item.title: Emerald farmer Ian Burnett identified as grandfather killed alongside grandson in Queensland
item.description: The devastating dam accident claimed the life of Ian Burnett and his seven-year-old grandson.

item.title: Australian Olympic swimmer Emily Seebohm asks mums on TikTok for help after ‘struggling’ with son’s sleep
item.description: The mum-of-one has asked other people for advice.

item.title: Israel passes controversial new death penalty bill targeting Palestinians
item.description: Australia joined France, Germany, Italy and the UK in voicing ‘deep concern’ for the bill.

item.title: Collingwood coach Craig McRae cheekily claims Gabba as a ‘good home ground’ ahead of Lions blockbuster
item.description: The Magpies are relishing the massive test against the two-time reigning premiers on their home turf.

item.title: 2026 Toyota HiLux BEV: New electric ute priced for Australia
item.description: Toyota's new electric HiLux is pricier than the diesel range, but has come in cheaper than expected with a base price of $74,990 before on-roads.

item.title: Delay for Brisbane teen accused of fatal stabbing of Universal Store co-founder Greg Josephson at Clayfield home
item.description: The 16-year-old, charged under ‘adult crime, adult time’ laws over the alleged murder at a house party, remains in custody.

item.title: Essendon and Carlton ‘have got identical problems’ with twin brothers Ben and Harry McKay underperforming
item.description: ‘Big guys, big contracts who can’t execute a single handball.’

item.title: Remote communities cut off as flights are axed despite soaring demand, Australian Competition and Consumer Commission finds
item.description: With two airlines dominating most routes, the country’s most isolated communities are left with few options.

item.title: Middle East conflict: Cut to Australia’s fuel excise is smart politics but a poor answer to fixing the root problem
item.description: The decision is part of the government’s plan to secure the country’s oil supply.

item.description: ‘I’m excited to create new memories.’

item.title: Volvo slashes pricing of EX30 and EX40 electric SUVs
item.description: Volvo has reduced prices of its smallest electric SUVs by between $7000 and $11,300 as it gets ready to launch the new EX60.

item.title: Missed throat scan finding led to Brisbane man Kyle Gallagher’s preventable death, coronial inquest finds
item.description: A critical throat injury was overlooked in the final 24 hours before his death, a coroner found.

item.description: Those close to the young Aussie woman have provided an update as she fights brain cancer.

item.description: It has been available for sale in store and online at Woolworths nationally.
